name: Sam Altman
summary: GPT-4o 图像生成能力正式上线，支持精准文字渲染与复杂场景合成，用户反响热烈。
summary_en: GPT-4o image generation officially launched with precise text rendering and complex scene synthesis. User response has been overwhelmingly positive.

name: Andrej Karpathy
summary: AI 工具正在将软件工程师转变为「软件指挥家」——更多精力用于编排，更少用于逐行编码。
summary_en: AI tools are turning software engineers into 'software conductors' — more effort spent orchestrating, less on line-by-line coding.

name: Ben Thompson
summary: AI 原生应用正在绕过传统分发渠道，直接触达用户，这将从根本上改变软件商业模式。
summary_en: AI-native apps are bypassing traditional distribution channels to reach users directly, fundamentally reshaping software business models.

name: Demis Hassabis
summary: Gemini 2.0 在科学推理基准上超越人类专家水平，标志着 AI 在专业领域的重要里程碑。
summary_en: Gemini 2.0 surpasses human expert-level performance on scientific reasoning benchmarks, marking a significant AI milestone in specialized domains.
